subject:
Re: Warp crashes after trying to import coordinates from relion
 autopick
body:
Hi Andrea,

what are the columns contained in the STAR file? Are you importing the 
particles, or using the "update particle defocus" button?

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Friday, October 26, 2018 at 6:23:02 PM UTC+2, Andrea Nans wrote:
>
> Hi,
>
> I'm trying to import an autopick.star file from Relion 3 into Warp but it 
> crashes each time. I would like to do the auto-picking in relion but take 
> advantage of the local CTF estimation in Warp.
>
> The file names match (ie the image is Micrograph_DW.mrc and autopick file 
> is Micrograph_DW_autopick.star).
>
> Is there anything that I'm missing?
>
> Thanks
>
> Andrea
>
>
